title: Christmas Gonk Mug 350ml Festive Ceramic Tea & Coffee Cup with Santa, Reindeer & Snowman Designs Gift Mug for Winter Hot Drinks (H 11cmx W 5.5cm) Assorted Merry Christmas Prints (Bird)
features: Festive Holiday Designs – Each mug features colourful Christmas characters like gonks (Santa gnomes), reindeer, snowmen, and snowy cottages
Assorted Merry Christmas Prints – Choose from 4 cheerful seasonal scenes, each with gold lettering and vibrant wintry backgrounds
Perfect 350ml Size – Great for morning coffee, hot chocolate, mulled wine, or your favourite festive brew
Durable Ceramic Build – Smooth glazed finish with curved handle and bright, long-lasting printed designs
Ready for Gifting – A fun and thoughtful holiday gift idea for family, friends, teachers, neighbours, or festive tableware lovers
description: Make your coffee breaks extra merry this season with a 350ml Christmas Gonk Mug a festive ceramic cup featuring whimsical winter scenes and holiday cheer. Each mug showcases classic Christmas icons like jolly gonks, reindeer, snowmen, and snowy cottages, all wrapped in bold seasonal colours with shimmering “Merry Christmas” slogans. Crafted from durable glazed ceramic, these mugs are designed to bring warmth to every winter sip — whether you’re enjoying a peppermint mocha, mulled wine, or a simple morning tea. The comfortable curved handle and classic shape make them perfect for everyday use throughout the holiday season. With four unique designs available, these mugs are ideal for gifting, stocking stuffers, or setting a festive tone at home or in the office
